item.title: Preparing for Harvest Season
item.description: Farm equipment and fields are readied for harvest season, showing maintenance, planning, and final checks before peak fieldwork begins.

media:content.media:title: Preparing for Harvest Season
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment and fields are readied for harvest season, showing maintenance, planning, and final checks before peak fieldwork begins.

item.title: It’s Done on the Farm
item.description: A major farm task is completed, showing the final steps, wrap-up process, and the satisfaction of finishing important seasonal work.

media:content.media:title: It’s Done on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A major farm task is completed, showing the final steps, wrap-up process, and the satisfaction of finishing important seasonal work.

item.title: Turnaround Needs Improvement
item.description: A farming operation highlights a challenging equipment turnaround, showing what went wrong, adjustments needed, and efforts to improve efficiency.

media:content.media:title: Turnaround Needs Improvement
media:content.media:description: A farming operation highlights a challenging equipment turnaround, showing what went wrong, adjustments needed, and efforts to improve efficiency.

item.title: New Crew Member Joins the Farm
item.description: A new member joins the farm crew, showing introductions, teamwork, and how operations adjust with fresh hands in daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: New Crew Member Joins the Farm
media:content.media:description: A new member joins the farm crew, showing introductions, teamwork, and how operations adjust with fresh hands in daily agricultural work.

item.title: Speech to Text and Corn Farming
item.description: A farm moment combines speech-to-text tools with corn work, showing how technology supports communication and efficiency in modern agriculture.

media:content.media:title: Speech to Text and Corn Farming
media:content.media:description: A farm moment combines speech-to-text tools with corn work, showing how technology supports communication and efficiency in modern agriculture.

item.title: Christmas Present Has Arrived
item.description: A Christmas present arrives and is revealed, showing excitement, surprise, and the anticipation of opening a special holiday gift.

media:content.media:title: Christmas Present Has Arrived
media:content.media:description: A Christmas present arrives and is revealed, showing excitement, surprise, and the anticipation of opening a special holiday gift.

item.title: Shopping with Friends on the Farm
item.description: A fun outing shows farm life off the field, featuring shopping, conversations, and time spent with friends away from daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Shopping with Friends on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A fun outing shows farm life off the field, featuring shopping, conversations, and time spent with friends away from daily agricultural work.

item.title: Want Some Rocks on the Farm
item.description: A farm moment involving rocks and fieldwork, showing unexpected obstacles, cleanup efforts, and the realities of managing agricultural land.

media:content.media:title: Want Some Rocks on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A farm moment involving rocks and fieldwork, showing unexpected obstacles, cleanup efforts, and the realities of managing agricultural land.

item.title: A Quiet Moment in the Fields
item.description: A calm moment in the fields highlights peaceful surroundings, open space, and the slower side of life during a day on the farm.

media:content.media:title: A Quiet Moment in the Fields
media:content.media:description: A calm moment in the fields highlights peaceful surroundings, open space, and the slower side of life during a day on the farm.

item.title: A Day of Challenges on the Farm
item.description: A full day of farm challenges unfolds, showing problem-solving, teamwork, and the ups and downs of daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: A Day of Challenges on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A full day of farm challenges unfolds, showing problem-solving, teamwork, and the ups and downs of daily agricultural work.

item.title: Working in the Rhubarb
item.description: A farm task takes place in a rhubarb patch, showing harvesting, field conditions, and the hands-on work involved with specialty crops.

media:content.media:title: Working in the Rhubarb
media:content.media:description: A farm task takes place in a rhubarb patch, showing harvesting, field conditions, and the hands-on work involved with specialty crops.

item.title: Questioning a Tractor Design Choice
item.description: A farming discussion looks at a tractor design choice, highlighting concerns, usability, and how equipment design impacts real field work.

media:content.media:title: Questioning a Tractor Design Choice
media:content.media:description: A farming discussion looks at a tractor design choice, highlighting concerns, usability, and how equipment design impacts real field work.
